extracted.title: Centerville Compressor Station Maintenance (EL300SEG), April 28-29, 2026
extracted.description:
Columbia Gulf Transmission LLC (CGT) notifies customers of upcoming maintenance on Centerville Compressor Station Unit 1201 on Tuesday, April 28, 2026 through Wednesday, April 29, 2026. As a result, the backhaul capacity through EL300SEG will be reduced to 350,000 Dth effective Timely Cycle for Gas Day Tuesday, April 28, 2026.

CGT anticipates this restriction may result in curtailments to Interruptible, Secondary Firm, and Primary Firm services. Please see the details provided below for more information.

EL300SEG
• Estimated Capacity Setting: 350,000 Dth
• Design Capacity: 575,000 Dth
• Posted Percentage: 61%

Due to the potential impact to firm service, CGT encourages customers to monitor the scheduled volumes on the Operationally Available Capacity screen on Informational Postings, as nominations can fluctuate based on market conditions.

Reservation Charge Credits (RCCs) will be determined per the process set forth in the General Terms and Conditions, Section 40 of CGT’s FERC Gas Tariff (Tariff). By means of this notice, CGT is establishing the 7-day Average Usage Quantity to be the period of April 16-22, 2026, pursuant to the provisions in the Tariff.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions.
